scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (teams, spaces, folders, lists, tasks); ClickUp's write endpoints (creating tasks, comments, etc.) are out of scope (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented task creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented comment creation; Pass B capability expansion
list-scoped task retrieval not modeled by legacy (legacy only reads team-scoped tasks); Pass B capability expansion
authenticated-user profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
